Edouard Desgrée

UX/UI Designer

Nantes, France
(+33) 7 82 91 23 44
edouard.desgree@gmail.com
Portfolio: edouard.desgree.com
LinkedIn: @edouarddesgree
GitHub: @edesgree

Introduction

Product designer focused on user experience, specialized in design systems, accessibility, and interface ergonomics. 15 years of experience in digital agencies, e-commerce, and the public sector.

Skills

UI Design & Prototyping
Figma: UI design, wireframing, prototyping, Atomic Design, design systems Design systems: Creation, structuring, and documentation within product teams UX writing & visual hierarchy: Interface clarity, microcopy, readability

Digital Accessibility
Compliance with RGAA (French General Accessibility Improvement Framework), WCAG 2.1, accessibility audits, UI best practices

UX Design
User flows: Wireflows, navigation structures, information architecture, scenarios Prototyping & testing: Interactive mockups, functional testing, user feedback UX research: Needs analysis, user observation, UX benchmarking

Frontend Technical Skills
Frontend development: HTML5, CSS3, Sass, VueJS, React, Symfony UI frameworks: Vuetify, Astro, Bulma, TailwindCSS, Material UI, Bootstrap, Foundation CMS & theme integration: WordPress, Magento 2, Symfony (Twig)

Methods & Collaboration Tools
Agile (SCRUM) & Design Thinking: Product team collaboration, design sprints, co-design Project tools: Jira, Trello, Confluence, Slack, Git, ZeroHeight, Storybook

Professional Experience

UX/UI Designer — National Health Insurance Fund (CNAM)

2024 – present | Angers, France

Project : Redesign of the “ameli.fr” user account platform – Agile product team

  • Contributed to UX scoping: needs analysis, user journeys, information architecture
  • Created wireframes and interactive prototypes (Figma)
  • Designed high-fidelity UI mockups aligned with a Vuetify-based design system
  • Helped structure and evolve the design system (aligned with Vuetify/VueJS components)
  • Close collaboration with product and development teams
  • Supported frontend integration with UX and accessibility guidance (RGAA)
  • Participated in functional testing and product validation
  • Conducted accessibility audits

UX/UI Designer / Frontend Developer — Génération Internet

2023 | Nantes, France

  • Designed UX/UI for websites and web applications, built design systems (Figma, Adobe XD)
  • Frontend development of custom Symfony websites (Twig, StimulusJS)
  • Production follow-up, client communication, and interface iterations

Freelance & Training

2020 – 2022 | New Zealand

  • Travel and volunteer work: van building, horticulture, environmental protection, WWOOFING
  • Built and updated websites for small NGOs and local farms
  • Continued self-training in WordPress (ACF, CPT, Gutenberg blocks) and web technologies

Frontend Developer Magento 2 — Absolunet (Valtech)

2017 – 2020 | Montreal, Canada

  • Frontend development on Magento 2 (HTML5, SASS, JavaScript, Foundation)
  • Creation of custom Magento themes and interactive components for e-commerce sites
  • Code reviews and pair programming in an Agile SCRUM environment (Certified Scrum Developer)
  • Accessibility (RGAA) and performance optimization
  • Wireframes and design using Sketch

UX/UI Designer / Frontend Developer — Productions Version 10

2011 – 2017 | Montreal, Canada

  • Frontend development (HTML5, CSS3, LESS, SASS, jQuery, JavaScript), W3C validation, cross-browser testing
  • UX/UI design: wireframes, mockups, prototypes
  • Mobile-first and responsive design implementation
  • Custom web projects using Symfony/Twig environments

UX/UI Designer — Comptoirs

2008 – 2011 | Paris, France

  • Art direction for websites and intranets (visual identity, logos, branding)
  • Information architecture: usability, navigation, wireframes
  • Frontend integration (XHTML, CSS), W3C validation, CMS adaptation (WordPress, Drupal)
  • Managed a team of junior designers

Webmaster — BNP Paribas (Canal Net)

2007 – 2008 | Paris, France

  • XML layout and updates for bnpparibas.net
  • Training of new employees on Documentum CMS and Epic Editor (XML)
  • Creation of visual assets (banners, graphics)

Web & Print Designer — Digiweb

2004 – 2006 | Dundalk, Ireland

  • Web design and frontend integration
  • Branding and print identity design (posters, flyers, brochures, stands, vehicle wraps)
  • Coordination with external suppliers (printers, manufacturers, designers)

Education

2024 – present Continuous training: Web accessibility, Storybook, VueJS, JavaScript

2025 Google UX Design Professional Certificate

2023 Online training: The Odin Project (web development), Scrimba (React, VueJS, TypeScript), CS50 Introduction to Computer Science

2000 – 2002 DUT in Communication Systems and Networks — IUT Laval General training in web and multimedia systems

Certifications
